languages.text: {n}Нунциус из последних сил едва заметно сжимает руку Эоганна, после чего она опадает на холодный металл сацеллума. На губах застыла последняя попытка улыбнуться.{/n}

{n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Нунциус из последних сил едва заметно сжимает руку Эоганна, после чего она опадает на холодный металл сацеллума. На губах застыла последняя попытка улыбнуться.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

{n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

{n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Con las pocas fuerzas que le quedan, Nuncius aprieta de manera casi imperceptible la mano de Eogunn antes de que su brazo se desplome sobre el frío metal del sacelio. Un último conato de sonrisa asoma a sus labios.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Con las pocas fuerzas que le quedan, Nuncius aprieta de manera casi imperceptible la mano de Eogunn antes de que su brazo se desplome sobre el frío metal del sacelio. Un último conato de sonrisa asoma a sus labios.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯使出最后一丝力气，几不可见地捏了一下伊奥贡的手，然后任由手臂坠落在神龛冰冷的金属上。他的嘴唇上凝固着最后一抹勉强挤出的笑意。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯使出最后一丝力气，几不可见地捏了一下伊奥贡的手，然后任由手臂坠落在神龛冰冷的金属上。他的嘴唇上凝固着最后一抹勉强挤出的笑意。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Avec ses dernières forces, Nuncius serre la main d'Eogunn presque imperceptiblement, avant de laisser son bras retomber sur le métal froid du sacellum, une dernière esquisse de sourire figée sur ses lèvres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec ses dernières forces, Nuncius serre la main d'Eogunn presque imperceptiblement, avant de laisser son bras retomber sur le métal froid du sacellum, une dernière esquisse de sourire figée sur ses lèvres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kalan son gücüyle Nuncius, Eogunn'un elini zor algılanır bir şekilde sıkıyor ve kolunu şapelin soğuk metaline doğru bırakıyor. Son kez gülümseme çabası, dudaklarında donup kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kalan son gücüyle Nuncius, Eogunn'un elini zor algılanır bir şekilde sıkıyor ve kolunu şapelin soğuk metaline doğru bırakıyor. Son kez gülümseme çabası, dudaklarında donup kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit einem letzten Anflug von Kraft drückt Nuncius kaum spürbar Eogunns Hand, ehe sein Arm auf das kalte Metall des Sacellums fällt. Ein letzter Versuch eines Lächelns ist auf seinen Lippen erstarrt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem letzten Anflug von Kraft drückt Nuncius kaum spürbar Eogunns Hand, ehe sein Arm auf das kalte Metall des Sacellums fällt. Ein letzter Versuch eines Lächelns ist auf seinen Lippen erstarrt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンキウスは、最後に残された力で、エオガンの手をかすかに握り返し、それから腕を聖龕の冷たい金属の上へと落とす。最後の微笑みを浮かべようとした名残が、その唇に凍りついている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ヌンキウスは、最後に残された力で、エオガンの手をかすかに握り返し、それから腕を聖龕の冷たい金属の上へと落とす。最後の微笑みを浮かべようとした名残が、その唇に凍りついている。{/n}
